title: olyra glaberrima var. humilis
intro: Olyra glaberrima var. humilis, also known as the lesser Olyra, is a type of grass found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Olyra glaberrima var. humilis is typically made into a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
